schedule-1:line1.label: Taxable state/local tax refunds
schedule-1:line1.so: Tani waa lacag-celinta canshuurta stateka ee sannadkii hore, oo sannadkan la canshuuro.
schedule-1:line1.en: This is a state or local tax refund from last year that's taxable this year.

schedule-1:line3.label: Business income
schedule-1:line3.so: Tani waa faa'iidada ama khasaaraha ganacsigaaga gaarka ah (Schedule C), sida ganacsi yar oo aad keligaa leedahay.
schedule-1:line3.en: This is the profit or loss from your own business, like a small business or self-employment work.

schedule-1:line7.label: Unemployment compensation
schedule-1:line7.so: Tani waa wadarta lacagta shaqo-la'aanta ee dawladdu kuu siisay sanadkan.
schedule-1:line7.en: This is the total unemployment benefits you received this year.

schedule-1:line9.label: Total other income
schedule-1:line9.so: Tani waa wadarta dakhliga kale ee aanan ku habboonayn sanduuqyada kale.
schedule-1:line9.en: This is the total of other income that doesn't fit the categories above.

schedule-1:line10.label: Total additional income
schedule-1:line10.so: Tani waa wadarta guud ee dakhliga dheeraadka ah ee ku jirta bogga 1, oo loo daro Form 1040 sanduuqa 8.
schedule-1:line10.en: This is the total additional income from this page, added into Form 1040, line 8.

schedule-1:line11.label: Educator expenses
schedule-1:line11.so: Tani waa kharashka aad ka bixisay alaabta fasalka haddii aad tahay macallin.
schedule-1:line11.en: This is money you spent on classroom supplies if you're a teacher.

schedule-1:line13.label: HSA deduction
schedule-1:line13.so: Tani waa lacagta aad geliyay akoonkaaga HSA (Health Savings Account), oo laga jaray dakhligaaga.
schedule-1:line13.en: This is money you put into your HSA (Health Savings Account), deducted from your income.

schedule-1:line15.label: Self-employment tax deduction
schedule-1:line15.so: Tani waa qaybta canshuurta shaqada madax-bannaan ee aad ka dhimi karto dakhligaaga.
schedule-1:line15.en: This is the part of your self-employment tax you get to deduct from your income.

schedule-1:line20.label: IRA deduction
schedule-1:line20.so: Tani waa lacagta aad geliyay akoonkaaga hawlgabka IRA, oo laga jaray dakhligaaga.
schedule-1:line20.en: This is money you put into an IRA retirement account, deducted from your income.

schedule-1:line21.label: Student loan interest deduction
schedule-1:line21.so: Tani waa ribada aad bixisay deynta waxbarashada, oo laga jaray dakhligaaga.
schedule-1:line21.en: This is the interest you paid on student loans, deducted from your income.

schedule-1:line25.label: Total adjustments to income
schedule-1:line25.so: Tani waa wadarta guud ee hagaajinta dakhliga ee bogga 2, oo loo daro Form 1040 sanduuqa 10.
schedule-1:line25.en: This is the total of all the adjustments from this page, added into Form 1040, line 10.
